description: TRINE v1.0.1 Stage-1 baseline metrics on all semantic datasets

sts.notes: STS-B train+dev only (GLUE test has no labels)

sick.notes: Best sentence-level rho — compositional pairs share surface structure

mrpc.notes: Surface-form overlap correlates well with paraphrase for news text

qqp.notes: 50K balanced subset. Questions often share surface words.

snli.notes: 100K balanced subset. Inference ≠ surface similarity — expected low baseline.

simlex.notes: Word pairs only — character n-grams see no shared surface structure.

wordsim.notes: Word pairs only — same as SimLex, near-zero baseline expected.

summary.interpretation: Stage-1 captures surface-form overlap. Sentence-level tasks where paraphrases share words show moderate correlation. Word-level tasks and inference tasks show near-zero — this is the gap Stage-2 must close.
